```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/abcjs-audio.css">

<style>
#rs-root {
  --pr:#2780e3; --br:#dee2e6; --bl:#e9ecef; --mu:#6c757d;
  --in:#212529; --sf:#fff; --bs:#f8f9fa;
  max-width:860px; margin:0 auto 2rem;
  font-family:var(--bs-font-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif); color:var(--in);
}
#rs-root .sq-card {
  background:var(--sf); border:1px solid var(--br); border-radius:.5rem;
  padding:1rem 1.15rem; margin:0 0 1rem; box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
}
#rs-root .sq-row { display:flex; gap:.5rem .75rem; align-items:flex-end; flex-wrap:wrap; }
#rs-root .sq-group { display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
#rs-root .sq-label {
  font-size:.78rem; color:var(--mu); font-weight:600;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.03em; margin-bottom:.25rem;
}
#rs-root select {
  padding:.35rem .6rem; font-size:.9rem; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius:.375rem; background:var(--sf); color:var(--in); height:auto;
}
#rs-root .sq-btn {
  padding:.35rem .7rem; font-size:.9rem; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius:.375rem; background:var(--sf); color:var(--in);
  cursor:pointer; line-height:1.5; white-space:nowrap;
}
#rs-root .sq-btn:disabled { opacity:.5; cursor:not-allowed; }
#rs-root .sq-cb {
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.35rem; font-size:.9rem;
}
#rs-root .sq-paper {
  background:var(--sf); border:1px solid var(--bl); border-radius:.375rem;
  padding:.4rem .5rem; min-height:56px; margin-bottom:.75rem;
}
#rs-root .sq-paper svg { width:100% !important; height:auto !important; display:block; }
#rs-root .cell-criteria {
  display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:4px 14px; margin-bottom:.6rem; font-size:.9rem;
}
#rs-root .cell-criteria label {
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-weight:normal; color:var(--in);
}
#rs-root .cell-criteria input[type=checkbox] { width:auto; margin:0; }
#rs-root .cell-criteria .placeholder { color:#adb5bd; }
#rs-root .cell-bank { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-end; gap:6px; margin-top:4px; }
#rs-root .cell-buttons { display:contents; }
#rs-root .cell-wrapper { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; }
#rs-root .cell-number { font-size:11px; color:var(--mu); margin-bottom:2px; margin-left:4px; }
#rs-root .cell-btn {
  background:var(--sf) !important; border:1px solid #ced4da !important;
  border-radius:.375rem !important; cursor:pointer !important;
  padding:2px !important; box-sizing:content-box !important;
  position:relative; overflow:hidden; height:50px;
  transition:border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s;
}
#rs-root .cell-btn:hover {
  border-color:var(--pr) !important; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(39,128,227,.15) !important;
}
#rs-root .cell-preview { pointer-events:none; }
#rs-root .cell-preview svg { display:block; }
#rs-root .cell-preview .abcjs-staff { display:none; }
#rs-root #abc-editor {
  display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; min-height:80px;
  padding:.4rem .5rem; font-family:monospace; font-size:.82rem;
  border:1px solid var(--br); border-radius:.375rem;
  background:var(--bs); color:var(--in); resize:vertical;
}
</style>

<script>
	let abc = [];
	let bars = [];
	let details = "";
	let rests = false;
	let currentTune = 0;
	let synthControl;

	const FAMILIES = {
		duple: { defaultL: "1/4", microbeatCount: 2, unitsPerMacrobeat: 1 },
		triple: { defaultL: "1/8", microbeatCount: 3, unitsPerMacrobeat: 3 }
	};

	const SOURCE_COLLECTIONS = {
		duple: ["Duple-M-m-2-4", "Duple-M-m-D-2/4", "Duple, M-m-D-E-2/4", "Duple, M-m-R-2/4", "Duple, M-m-D-E-R-U-2/4"],
		triple: ["Triple-M-m-6/8", "Triple-M-m-D-6/8", "Triple-M-m-D-E-6/8"]
	};

	let currentBarQuarters = 0;
	let activeCells = [];
	const cellPoolCache = {};

	function getActiveFamily() {
		const collection = document.getElementById("collection-selector").value;
		return /^Triple/i.test(collection) ? "triple" : "duple";
	}

	function inferCriteriaFromCollectionName(name) {
		const tokens = name.split(/[-,]/).map(function(t) { return t.trim(); });
		return {
			macrobeat: true,
			microbeat: true,
			division: tokens.indexOf("D") !== -1,
			elongation: tokens.indexOf("E") !== -1,
			rest: tokens.indexOf("R") !== -1
		};
	}

	function getSelectedCriteria() {
		return {
			macrobeat: document.getElementById("crit-macrobeat").checked,
			microbeat: document.getElementById("crit-microbeat").checked,
			division: document.getElementById("crit-division").checked,
			elongation: document.getElementById("crit-elongation").checked,
			rest: document.getElementById("crit-rest").checked
		};
	}

	function setSelectedCriteria(criteria) {
		document.getElementById("crit-macrobeat").checked = criteria.macrobeat;
		document.getElementById("crit-microbeat").checked = criteria.microbeat;
		document.getElementById("crit-division").checked = criteria.division;
		document.getElementById("crit-elongation").checked = criteria.elongation;
		document.getElementById("crit-rest").checked = criteria.rest;
	}

	function tokenLenFraction(mod) {
		if (!mod) return [1, 1];
		const match = /^(\d*)(\/*)(\d*)$/.exec(mod);
		const numerator = match[1] ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : 1;
		let denominator;
		if (match[2]) denominator = match[3] ? parseInt(match[3], 10) : Math.pow(2, match[2].length);
		else denominator = 1;
		return [numerator, denominator];
	}

	function parseGroupTokens(group) {
		const tokens = [];
		let i = 0;
		let pendingMultiplier = 1;
		let hasRest = false;
		let hasElongationMark = false;
		while (i < group.length) {
			const ch = group[i];
			if (ch === "B" || ch === "z") {
				if (ch === "z") hasRest = true;
				let j = i + 1;
				let mod = "";
				while (j < group.length && /[\d/]/.test(group[j])) { mod += group[j]; j++; }
				let tie = false;
				if (group[j] === "-") { tie = true; j++; }
				const lenFraction = tokenLenFraction(mod);
				let duration = (lenFraction[0] / lenFraction[1]) * pendingMultiplier;
				pendingMultiplier = 1;
				if (group[j] === ">") { duration *= 1.5; pendingMultiplier = 0.5; hasElongationMark = true; j++; }
				else if (group[j] === "<") { duration *= 0.5; pendingMultiplier = 1.5; hasElongationMark = true; j++; }
				tokens.push({ duration: duration, tie: tie });
				i = j;
			} else {
				i++;
			}
		}
		return { tokens: tokens, hasRest: hasRest, hasElongationMark: hasElongationMark };
	}

	const FORCE_DIVISION_AND_ELONGATION = new Set(["B/>B/", "B/<B/", "B//B/B//"]);

	function classifyCell(group, family) {
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES[family];
		const parsed = parseGroupTokens(group);
		if (parsed.tokens.length === 0) return null;
		if (parsed.tokens[parsed.tokens.length - 1].tie) return null;

		const total = parsed.tokens.reduce(function(sum, t) { return sum + t.duration; }, 0);
		if (Math.abs(total - familyInfo.unitsPerMacrobeat) > 1e-9) return null;

		const microbeatDuration = familyInfo.unitsPerMacrobeat / familyInfo.microbeatCount;
		const hasDivision = parsed.tokens.some(function(t) { return t.duration < microbeatDuration - 1e-9; });

		const isMacrobeat = parsed.tokens.length === 1 && !parsed.hasRest && !parsed.hasElongationMark;
		const isMicrobeat = !isMacrobeat && !parsed.hasRest && !parsed.hasElongationMark && !hasDivision &&
			parsed.tokens.length === familyInfo.microbeatCount &&
			parsed.tokens.every(function(t) { return Math.abs(t.duration - microbeatDuration) < 1e-9; });

		const required = {};
		if (isMacrobeat) required.macrobeat = true;
		else if (isMicrobeat) required.microbeat = true;
		else {
			if (hasDivision) required.division = true;
			if (parsed.hasElongationMark) required.elongation = true;
			if (parsed.hasRest) required.rest = true;
		}
		if (FORCE_DIVISION_AND_ELONGATION.has(group)) {
			return { required: { division: true, elongation: true }, isMacrobeat: false, isMicrobeat: false };
		}
		return { required: required, isMacrobeat: isMacrobeat, isMicrobeat: isMicrobeat };
	}

	function extractCellsFromCollection(collectionKey, family) {
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(rhythmPatternObject[collectionKey]);
		const found = [];
		tuneBook.tunes.forEach(function(tune) {
			const lines = tune.abc.split("\n");
			let bodyLine = "";
			lines.forEach(function(line) {
				if (/^[A-Za-z]:/.test(line)) return;
				if (line.trim() === "") return;
				bodyLine = line;
			});
			if (!bodyLine) return;
			bodyLine.split("|").forEach(function(bar) {
				bar.trim().split(/\s+/).forEach(function(group) {
					if (group === "") return;
					const classified = classifyCell(group, family);
					if (classified) found.push({ abc: group, required: classified.required });
				});
			});
		});
		return found;
	}

	const LONG_ELONGATION_CELLS = {
		duple: [
			{ abc: "B2", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B3 B", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B B3", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B4", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B> B", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B< B", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B/ B B/", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B//B/B/B/B//", required: { division: true, elongation: true } }
		],
		triple: [
			{ abc: "B6", required: { elongation: true } }
		]
	};

	function getLongElongationCells(family) {
		return LONG_ELONGATION_CELLS[family].map(function(entry) {
			const parsed = parseGroupTokens(entry.abc);
			const totalLUnits = parsed.tokens.reduce(function(sum, t) { return sum + t.duration; }, 0);
			return { abc: entry.abc, required: entry.required, totalLUnits: totalLUnits };
		});
	}

	function getCellPool(family) {
		if (cellPoolCache[family]) return cellPoolCache[family];
		const seen = new Set();
		const pool = [];
		SOURCE_COLLECTIONS[family].forEach(function(collectionKey) {
			extractCellsFromCollection(collectionKey, family).forEach(function(cell) {
				if (seen.has(cell.abc)) return;
				seen.add(cell.abc);
				pool.push(cell);
			});
		});
		getLongElongationCells(family).forEach(function(cell) {
			if (seen.has(cell.abc)) return;
			seen.add(cell.abc);
			pool.push(cell);
		});
		cellPoolCache[family] = pool;
		return pool;
	}

	function parseFraction(str, fallback) {
		const match = (str || "").match(/(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/);
		return match ? parseInt(match[1]) / parseInt(match[2]) : fallback;
	}

	function getFilteredCells(family, criteria) {
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES[family];
		const Lfraction = parseFraction(familyInfo.defaultL, 0.25);
		const { headerLines } = splitHeaderAndBody(document.getElementById("abc-editor").value);
		const barCapacity = parseFraction(getHeaderValue(headerLines, "M"), 1) * 4;

		return getCellPool(family).filter(function(cell) {
			if (!Object.keys(cell.required).every(function(need) { return criteria[need]; })) return false;
			if (cell.totalLUnits !== undefined && cell.totalLUnits * Lfraction * 4 > barCapacity + 1e-9) return false;
			return true;
		});
	}

	function getHeaderValue(headerLines, letter) {
		const prefix = new RegExp("^" + letter + ":\\s*(.+)$");
		for (const line of headerLines) {
			const match = line.match(prefix);
			if (match) return match[1].trim();
		}
		return null;
	}

	function splitHeaderAndBody(abcString) {
		const headerLines = [];
		let bodyLine = "";
		for (const line of abcString.split("\n")) {
			if (/^[A-Za-z]:/.test(line) || line.startsWith("%%")) {
				headerLines.push(line);
			} else if (line.trim() !== "") {
				bodyLine = line;
			}
		}
		return { headerLines, bodyLine };
	}

	const CELL_NOTE_SPACING = 0.9;

	function renderCellBank() {
		const family = getActiveFamily();
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES[family];
		const criteria = getSelectedCriteria();
		activeCells = getFilteredCells(family, criteria);

		const { headerLines } = splitHeaderAndBody(document.getElementById("abc-editor").value);
		const currentL = getHeaderValue(headerLines, "L") || familyInfo.defaultL;

		const container = document.getElementById("cell-buttons");
		container.innerHTML = "";

		const entries = [];
		let maxScaledWidth = 0;

		activeCells.forEach(function(cell, i) {
			const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
			wrapper.className = "cell-wrapper";

			const numberLabel = document.createElement("span");
			numberLabel.className = "cell-number";
			numberLabel.textContent = String(i + 1);
			wrapper.appendChild(numberLabel);

			const button = document.createElement("button");
			button.type = "button";
			button.className = "cell-btn";
			button.setAttribute("aria-label", "Cell: " + cell.abc);
			button.addEventListener("click", function() { appendCell(i); });

			const preview = document.createElement("div");
			preview.className = "cell-preview";
			button.appendChild(preview);
			wrapper.appendChild(button);

			container.appendChild(wrapper);

			const abcString = "X:1\nM:none\nL:" + currentL + "\nK:clef=none\n" + cell.abc;
			ABCJS.renderAbc(preview, abcString, { add_classes: true });

			const svg = preview.querySelector("svg");
			svg.style.transformOrigin = "0 0";
			const bbox = svg.getBBox();
			maxScaledWidth = Math.max(maxScaledWidth, bbox.width * CELL_NOTE_SPACING);
			entries.push({ button: button, svg: svg, bbox: bbox });
		});

		const buttonWidth = Math.ceil(maxScaledWidth) + 16;

		entries.forEach(function(entry) {
			entry.button.style.width = buttonWidth + "px";

			const contentWidth = entry.button.clientWidth;
			const contentHeight = entry.button.clientHeight;
			const scaledLeft = entry.bbox.x * CELL_NOTE_SPACING;
			const scaledWidth = entry.bbox.width * CELL_NOTE_SPACING;
			const translateX = contentWidth / 2 - (scaledLeft + scaledWidth / 2);
			const translateY = contentHeight / 2 - (entry.bbox.y + entry.bbox.height / 2);
			entry.svg.style.transform =
				"translate(" + translateX + "px, " + translateY + "px) scale(" + CELL_NOTE_SPACING + ", 1)";
		});
	}

	function lUnitsToSuffix(lUnits) {
		const rounded = Math.round(lUnits);
		return rounded === 1 ? "" : String(rounded);
	}

	function appendCell(index) {
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES[getActiveFamily()];
		const editor = document.getElementById("abc-editor");
		const { headerLines, bodyLine } = splitHeaderAndBody(editor.value);

		const barCapacity = parseFraction(getHeaderValue(headerLines, "M"), 1) * 4;
		const unitLength = parseFraction(getHeaderValue(headerLines, "L"), parseFraction(familyInfo.defaultL, 0.25));

		const cell = activeCells[index];
		const parsed = parseGroupTokens(cell.abc);
		const cellLUnits = parsed.tokens.reduce(function(sum, t) { return sum + t.duration; }, 0);
		const cellQuarters = cellLUnits * unitLength * 4;
		const remainingQuarters = barCapacity - currentBarQuarters;

		let newBody = bodyLine.replace(/\s+$/, "");

		if (cellQuarters <= remainingQuarters + 1e-9) {
			newBody += (newBody ? " " : "") + cell.abc;
			currentBarQuarters += cellQuarters;
		} else if (parsed.tokens.length === 1 && !parsed.hasRest) {
			const firstLUnits = remainingQuarters / (unitLength * 4);
			const restLUnits = cellLUnits - firstLUnits;
			newBody += (newBody ? " " : "") + "B" + lUnitsToSuffix(firstLUnits) + "-";
			newBody += " | B" + lUnitsToSuffix(restLUnits);
			currentBarQuarters = restLUnits * unitLength * 4;
		} else {
			return;
		}

		if (currentBarQuarters >= barCapacity - 1e-9) {
			newBody += " |";
			currentBarQuarters = 0;
		}

		renderTune(headerLines.join("\n") + "\n" + newBody, true);
	}

	function clearNotes() {
		const editor = document.getElementById("abc-editor");
		const { headerLines } = splitHeaderAndBody(editor.value);
		currentBarQuarters = 0;
		renderTune(headerLines.join("\n") + "\n", true);
	}

	function setRests() {
		rests = document.getElementById("set-rests").checked;
		setTune();
	}

	function refreshSongbook(someAbc) {
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(someAbc);
		const selectTune = document.getElementById("tune-selector");
		selectTune.innerHTML = "";
		abc.length = 0;
		bars.length = 0;
		for (let i = 0; i < tuneBook.tunes.length; i++) {
			const option = document.createElement("option");
			option.textContent = tuneBook.tunes[i].id;
			option.value = i;
			let abcString = tuneBook.tunes[i].abc;
			abc.push(abcString);
			const lines = abcString.split("\n");
			if (i !== tuneBook.tunes.length - 1) lines.pop();
			bars.push(lines.pop());
			lines.shift();
			details = lines.join("\n");
			selectTune.appendChild(option);
		}
	}

	function refreshCollection() {
		const collection = document.getElementById("collection-selector").value;
		refreshSongbook(rhythmPatternObject[collection]);
		pickTune();
		setSelectedCriteria(inferCriteriaFromCollectionName(collection));
		renderCellBank();
	}

	function criteriaChanged() {
		renderCellBank();
	}

	function applyMeter_rs() {
		var stored = null;
		try { stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tuneMeter")); } catch(e) {}
		if (!stored) return;
		var n = stored.n, d = stored.d;
		var isTriple = (n === 3) || (n % 3 === 0 && d === 8);
		var wantFamily = isTriple ? "Triple" : "Duple";
		var meterStr = n + "/" + d;
		var meterDash = n + "-" + d;
		var sel = document.getElementById("collection-selector");
		if (!sel) return;
		var current = sel.value;
		if (current.startsWith(wantFamily)) return;
		var options = Array.from(sel.options).map(function(o) { return o.value; });
		var candidates = options.filter(function(o) { return o.startsWith(wantFamily); });
		if (!candidates.length) return;
		var hasD = current.indexOf("-D") !== -1 || current.indexOf(", M-m-D") !== -1;
		var hasE = current.indexOf("-E") !== -1;
		var hasR = current.indexOf("-R") !== -1;
		var typed = candidates.filter(function(o) {
			return (o.indexOf("-D") !== -1 || o.indexOf(", M-m-D") !== -1) === hasD &&
				(o.indexOf("-E") !== -1) === hasE &&
				(o.indexOf("-R") !== -1) === hasR;
		});
		var pool = typed.length ? typed : candidates;
		var best = pool.find(function(o) { return o.indexOf(meterStr) !== -1 || o.indexOf(meterDash) !== -1; }) || pool[0];
		if (best !== current) { sel.value = best; refreshCollection(); }
	}

	function load() {
		const selectCollection = document.getElementById("collection-selector");
		for (const key in rhythmPatternObject) {
			const option = document.createElement("option");
			option.textContent = key;
			option.value = key;
			selectCollection.appendChild(option);
		}

		const RS_CFG = window.TOOL_CONFIG || {};
		if (RS_CFG.collections && RS_CFG.collections.length)
			Array.from(selectCollection.options).forEach(function(o) { if (RS_CFG.collections.indexOf(o.value) === -1) o.remove(); });
		if (RS_CFG.lockCollections || selectCollection.options.length <= 1)
			(selectCollection.closest('.sq-group') || selectCollection).style.display = 'none';

		refreshSongbook(rhythmPatternObject[selectCollection.value]);

		document.querySelector("#rs-root .next").addEventListener("click", next);
		document.querySelector("#rs-root .warp").addEventListener("click", warp);
		document.querySelector("#rs-root .seek").addEventListener("click", seek);
		document.querySelector("#rs-root .seek2").addEventListener("click", seek2);
		document.querySelector("#rs-root #seek-units").addEventListener("change", seekExplanation);

		if (ABCJS.synth.supportsAudio()) {
			synthControl = new ABCJS.synth.SynthController();
			synthControl.load("#audio", cursorControl, {
				displayLoop: true, displayRestart: true,
				displayPlay: true, displayProgress: true, displayWarp: true
			});
		} else {
			document.querySelector("#audio").innerHTML =
				"<div class='audio-error'>Audio is not supported in this browser.</div>";
		}

		setTune(false);
		if (RS_CFG.criteria) setSelectedCriteria(RS_CFG.criteria);
		else setSelectedCriteria(inferCriteriaFromCollectionName(selectCollection.value));
		renderCellBank();
		if (RS_CFG.lockCriteria)
			document.querySelectorAll('#rs-root .cell-criteria input[type=checkbox]').forEach(function(cb) { cb.disabled = true; });

		applyMeter_rs();
		window.addEventListener("storage", function(e) { if (e.key === "tuneMeter") applyMeter_rs(); });

		document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
			const active = document.activeElement;
			const isTyping = active && (active.tagName === "TEXTAREA" || (active.tagName === "INPUT" && active.type !== "checkbox" && active.type !== "radio"));
			if (isTyping) return;

			const number = parseInt(e.key, 10);
			if (!isNaN(number) && number >= 1 && number <= activeCells.length) {
				appendCell(number - 1);
			}
		});
	}

	function renderTune(abcString, userAction) {
		document.getElementById("abc-editor").value = abcString;

		const abcOptions = { add_classes: true, clickListener: clickListener };
		const seekControls = document.querySelector("#rs-root .seek-controls");
		seekControls.classList.add("disabled");
		synthControl.disable(true);

		const visualObj = ABCJS.renderAbc("paper", abcString, abcOptions)[0];
		document.querySelector("#rs-root .midi").innerHTML = ABCJS.synth.getMidiFile(abcString);

		const synthOpts = { midiTranspose: -11 };

		getSoundfontUrl().then(function(sfUrl) {
			return new ABCJS.synth.CreateSynth().init({
				visualObj: visualObj,
				options: { soundFontUrl: sfUrl }
			});
		}).then(function() {
			if (synthControl) {
				synthControl.setTune(visualObj, userAction, synthOpts).then(function() {
					seekControls.classList.remove("disabled");
					seekExplanation();
				}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
			}
		}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
	}

	function setTune(userAction, r) {
		currentBarQuarters = 0;

		const pattern = document.getElementById("collection-selector").value;
		const isUnmetered = /U/.test(pattern);
		document.getElementById("randomPattern").disabled = isUnmetered;
		if (isUnmetered) r = false;

		let abcString = abc[currentTune];

		if (r) {
			const pattern1 = bars[Math.floor(Math.random() * bars.length)];
			const pattern2 = bars[Math.floor(Math.random() * bars.length)];
			abcString = details + "\n" + pattern1 + pattern2;
		}

		const barCount = (abcString.match(/\|/g) || []).length;
		const lines = abcString.split("\n");
		lines[0] += "\n%%MIDI channel 10 ";

		const lastIndex = (currentTune === abc.length - 1 && !r)
			? lines.length - 1
			: lines.length - 2;
		if (rests) lines[lastIndex] += "Z" + barCount + "|";
		lines[lastIndex] += "|";
		if (r) lines.push("");

		abcString = lines.join("\n");

		renderTune(abcString, userAction);
	}

	let editTimeout;
	function editTune() {
		clearTimeout(editTimeout);
		editTimeout = setTimeout(function() {
			renderTune(document.getElementById("abc-editor").value, true);
			renderCellBank();
		}, 400);
	}

	function next() {
		currentTune = (parseInt(currentTune) + 1) % abc.length;
		document.getElementById("tune-selector").value = currentTune;
		setTune(true);
	}

	function pickTune() {
		currentTune = parseInt(document.getElementById("tune-selector").value);
		setTune(true);
	}
</script>

<div id="rs-root">
	<!-- Hidden utility elements required by JS -->
	<div class="midi" style="display:none">MIDI</div>
	<div class="seek-controls disabled" style="display:none">
		<label>Seek: <input type="number" min="0" id="seek-amount"></label>
		<select aria-label="seek units" id="seek-units">
			<option value="percent">Percent</option>
			<option value="seconds">Seconds</option>
			<option value="beats">Beats</option>
		</select>
		<button class="seek2">Seek</button>
		<span id="unit-explanation"></span>
	</div>
	<div style="display:none">
		<button class="warp">Rand. Warp</button>
		<button class="seek">Seek to Middle</button>
	</div>

	<!-- Playback controls -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<div class="sq-row">
			<div class="sq-group">
				<span class="sq-label">Collection</span>
				<select id="collection-selector" onchange="refreshCollection()"></select>
			</div>
			<div class="sq-group">
				<span class="sq-label">Pattern</span>
				<select id="tune-selector" onchange="pickTune()"></select>
			</div>
			<button class="sq-btn next">Next</button>
			<button class="sq-btn" id="randomPattern" onclick="setTune(true, true)">Rand</button>
			<div id="audio"></div>
			<label class="sq-cb">
				<input type="checkbox" id="set-rests" onclick="setRests()"> Rests
			</label>
		</div>
	</div>

	<!-- Cell bank -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<div class="cell-criteria">
			<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-macrobeat" onchange="criteriaChanged()"> Macrobeat</label>
			<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-microbeat" onchange="criteriaChanged()"> Microbeat</label>
			<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-division" onchange="criteriaChanged()"> Division</label>
			<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-elongation" onchange="criteriaChanged()"> Elongation</label>
			<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-rest" onchange="criteriaChanged()"> Rest</label>
			<label class="placeholder" title="Not yet supported">
				<input type="checkbox" id="crit-upbeat" disabled> Upbeat
			</label>
		</div>
		<div class="cell-bank">
			<div class="cell-buttons" id="cell-buttons"></div>
			<button type="button" class="sq-btn" onclick="clearNotes()">Clear</button>
		</div>
	</div>

	<!-- Notation output -->
	<div id="paper" class="sq-paper"></div>

	<!-- ABC editor -->
	<textarea id="abc-editor" spellcheck="false" oninput="editTune()"></textarea>
</div>

<script src="/apps/shared/soundfont.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/cursor-synth.js"></script>
<script>
	const cursorControl = new CursorControl();
	load();
</script>
```
